special_mechanics.name: Mounting Bizarrians
special_mechanics.description: Players can mount various steeds (bizarrians) including the Cockatrice for basic knockdown attacks and dragons that breathe fire or shoot fireballs

special_mechanics.name: Magic Spells
special_mechanics.description: Characters cast screen-clearing spells with damage scaling based on magic bar count. Gilius uses lightning, Ax uses earth spells, Tyris uses fire magic

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia article provides gameplay mechanics and character descriptions but no specific physics values, velocities, acceleration rates, or sub-pixel system information are documented. This is a beat-em-up action game where precise movement physics are not typically detailed in public documentation.
